special_mechanics.name: footballer_switching
special_mechanics.description: Player can switch control between any of the eleven footballers on their team at will

special_mechanics.name: penalty_shootout
special_mechanics.description: Implemented penalty shootout mechanic to resolve drawn games after extra time (improvement over FIFA International Soccer's next-goal-wins)

tier_notes: T2 - Sports game with gameplay improvements documented through review sources. No detailed physics parameters available in documentation. Sources focus on game features and design improvements rather than technical movement parameters.
